title: Warium Ponder & JEI
description: Ponder scenes and additional JEI integration for Warium
body:
Warium Ponder & JEI adds interactive **[«Ponder»](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Ponder)** guides and JEI integration for Warium machines.

- **If installed on client**: ponder guides and JEI recipes are available.
- **If installed on server** _(still required on client)_: Warium recipes that were hardcoded are registered under `warium_ponder_jei` namespace and can be changed via datapack _(See `data/warium_ponder_jei/recipes/...` inside this mod jar for reference)_. Also fixes Assembly Machine not working when Supplementaries is installed

As of 2.0.0 there are only a few ponder guides. Most of the ponders from previos versions were removed since this mod no longer relies on Ponder for KubeJS and I need time to rewrite ponders in Java + some of them are deprecated and need to be updated.
